auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Pingdom API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Generate it in My Pingdom under Integrations > The Pingdom API: https://my.solarwinds.cloud/.

actions.name: get_check
actions.description: Retrieve a detailed Pingdom uptime check by ID.

check_id.description: A numeric identifier returned by the Pingdom API.

include_teams.description: Whether to include team connections for the Pingdom check.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Pingdom check.

check.description: A detailed Pingdom check returned by the check detail endpoint.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Retrieve Pingdom account check and SMS credit information.

inputSchema.description: This Pingdom action does not require input.

credits.description: Credit and quota information returned by Pingdom.

actions.name: list_checks
actions.description: List Pingdom uptime checks with optional pagination and tag filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of Pingdom checks to return.

offset.description: The zero-based pagination offset. Pingdom requires limit when offset is used.

showencryption.description: Whether to include each check's encryption setting.

include_tags.description: Whether to include tags for each Pingdom check.

include_severity.description: Whether to include severity for each Pingdom check.

tags.description: A comma-separated tag list used to filter Pingdom checks.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Pingdom checks.

id.description: A numeric identifier returned by the Pingdom API.

name.description: The human-readable name of the Pingdom check.

type.description: The Pingdom check type, such as http, tcp, or dns.

status.description: The current status of the Pingdom check.

hostname.description: The target host monitored by the Pingdom check.

resolution.description: How often Pingdom tests the check, in minutes.

name.description: The tag name returned by Pingdom.

type.description: The tag type returned by Pingdom.

count.description: The number of resources using this tag.

items.description: A Pingdom tag attached to a check.

tags.description: Tags attached to the Pingdom check.

items.description: A Pingdom check returned by the checks API.

checks.description: The Pingdom checks returned for this page.

total.description: The total number of Pingdom checks.

limited.description: The number of Pingdom checks after tag filtering was applied.

filtered.description: The number of Pingdom checks after pagination was applied.

anyOf.description: Count metadata returned by the Pingdom checks list endpoint.

actions.name: list_probes
actions.description: List Pingdom probe servers and their location details.

limit.description: The maximum number of Pingdom probes to return.

offset.description: The zero-based pagination offset. Pingdom requires limit when offset is used.

onlyactive.description: Whether to return only currently active Pingdom probes.

includedeleted.description: Whether to include old Pingdom probes that are no longer in use.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Pingdom probe servers.

id.description: A numeric identifier returned by the Pingdom API.

country.description: The country where the Pingdom probe is located.

city.description: The city where the Pingdom probe is located.

name.description: The display name of the Pingdom probe location.

active.description: Whether the Pingdom probe is currently active.

hostname.description: The DNS name of the Pingdom probe server.

ip.description: The IPv4 address of the Pingdom probe server.

ipv6.description: The IPv6 address of the Pingdom probe server.

countryiso.description: The ISO country code for the Pingdom probe.

probes.description: The Pingdom probes returned by the API.
